data.title: Prediction platform: Powell's opening probability of "Good afternoon" is 96%.
data.description: According to a US forecasting platform, there's a 96% chance that Federal Reserve Chairman Powell will open his press conference with "Good afternoon." The market has learned from previous press conferences that if Powell says "Good afternoon," it signals a hawkish stance, while if he says "Hello everyone," it signals a dovish stance. (Jinshi)

data.title: Buterin Justifies Long Ethereum Unstaking Process Amid Criticism Over 43-Day Delays
data.description:
Vitalik Buterin defended Ethereum's controversial 43-day unstaking delays that currently trap 2. 49M ETH worth billions in exit queues, comparing validator commitment to military duty while acknowledging UX concerns as the debate highlights fundamental tensions between blockchain security and modern liquidity expectations.
source: https://cryptonews.com/news/buterin-justifies-long-ethereum-unstaking-process-amid-criticism-over-43-day-delays/

data.title: Trading volume in the Fed interest rate prediction market on Kalshi surpasses $86 million
data.description: Data shows that Kalshi's prediction market volume for today's Federal Reserve interest rate decision has exceeded $86 million, currently at $86.84 million. The probability of a 25 basis point rate cut is 92%.

data.title: Intel rally boosts Trump’s stake in company by $4.9 billion, reigniting allegations of insider trading
data.description:
Intel shares blew through the roof Thursday after Nvidia dropped $5 billion into the struggling chipmaker, handing Donald Trump a fresh $4. 9 billion paper gain tied to a government stake he pushed through weeks earlier. The rally, which is by the way Intel’s biggest one-day surge in nearly 40 years, shot the stock to $31. 79 […]

data.title: Three members of the Federal Reserve may want to keep interest rates unchanged at this meeting
data.description: According to IFR, a Reuters affiliate, the first headline for market participants, aside from the 25 basis point rate cut, is likely to be the dissenting opinion of three or more officials. Waller, Bowman, and Milan will undoubtedly be the three who favor a larger rate cut, while the other dissenters could be Goolsbee, Schmid, or Mousalem, who favor holding rates steady. However, what traders are really focused on is the FOMC's dot plot, predicting only one rate cut in 2025 or perhaps two more. Trump's strategy in removing Fed Governor Cook is likely intended to ensure two more rate cuts in 2025 after today's cut. (Jinshi)

data.title: Trump's second son: Cryptocurrency is the "perfect hedge tool" for real estate assets
data.description: Eric Trump, the second son of Trump, said that cryptocurrency is the "perfect hedge tool" for real estate assets, and the Trump Organization has "almost no debt" and is committed to owning a share of Bitcoin in the United States. (Jinshi)

data.title: BlackRock deposits 4,538 ETH worth $20.42 million into Coinbase Prime
data.description: According to Lookonchain monitoring, BlackRock deposited 4,538 ETH into Coinbase Prime, valued at $20.42 million. In addition, BlackRock received 293.6 BTC from Coinbase Prime, valued at $34 million.
